def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    NVDA trading strategy using MACD, RSI, and moving average crossover.
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check required columns
    required_cols = ['MACD', 'MACD_Signal', 'RSI', 'MA5', 'MA20', 'Close']
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # Initialize conditions
    macd_bullish = df['MACD'] > df['MACD_Signal']
    rsi_oversold = df['RSI'] < 70
    rsi_not_extreme = df['RSI'] > 25
    ma_bullish = df['MA5'] > df['MA20']
    
    # Volume confirmation (if available)
    if 'Volume' in df.columns:
        vol_ma = df['Volume'].rolling(20).mean()
        vol_confirmation = df['Volume'] > vol_ma * 0.8
    else:
        vol_confirmation = True
    
    # Entry signal: MACD bullish + RSI not overbought + MA uptrend + volume
    entry_signal = macd_bullish & rsi_oversold & rsi_not_extreme & ma_bullish & vol_confirmation
    
    # Exit signal: MACD bearish or RSI overbought
    exit_signal = (df['MACD'] < df['MACD_Signal']) | (df['RSI'] > 75)
    
    # State machine logic
    position = 0
    for i in range(len(df)):
        if position == 0 and entry_signal.iloc[i]:
            position = 1
        elif position == 1 and exit_signal.iloc[i]:
            position = 0
        signal.iloc[i] = position
    
    return signal

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Multi-indicator momentum strategy for NVDA
    Combines MACD, RSI, and moving average crossovers
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check required columns
    required = ["Close", "MA5", "MA20", "MACD", "MACD_Signal", "RSI"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required):
        return signal
    
    # Condition 1: MACD bullish crossover
    macd_bullish = (df["MACD"] > df["MACD_Signal"]) & \
                   (df["MACD"].shift(1) <= df["MACD_Signal"].shift(1))
    
    # Condition 2: Price above both MA5 and MA20
    price_above_ma = (df["Close"] > df["MA5"]) & (df["Close"] > df["MA20"])
    
    # Condition 3: MA5 above MA20 (uptrend)
    ma_bullish = df["MA5"] > df["MA20"]
    
    # Condition 4: RSI not overbought (< 70) and not oversold (> 30)
    rsi_valid = (df["RSI"] > 30) & (df["RSI"] < 70)
    
    # Condition 5: RSI momentum - RSI above 50 suggests strength
    rsi_momentum = df["RSI"] > 50
    
    # Combined signal: Enter on MACD crossover with price/MA confirmation
    signal[(macd_bullish & price_above_ma & ma_bullish & rsi_momentum)] = 1
    
    # Exit when any major condition breaks
    signal[(~price_above_ma) | (~ma_bullish) | (df["RSI"] > 75)] = 0
    
    # Forward fill to maintain position
    signal = signal.fillna(method="ffill").fillna(0)
    
    return signal.astype(int)
